title: Metaltex Bries Laundry Airer with Folding Wing, Epotherm Coating, Black, Silver
features: ENERGY-SAVING AIRER - The Metaltex Bries Laundry Dryer is a simple way to save energy and make your clothes last! This clothing rack provides space to dry your clothes and smaller essentials like towels and can hook onto radiators, doors and balconies

DURABLE EPOTHERM COATING - This home and laundry accessory is treated in Metaltex’s exclusive Epotherm coating. The specialised coating provides around 30% more protection than normal and it will not chip, crack or discolour. The dryer also has anti-static additives to provide a dust-resistant barrier and is covered by a 5-year guarantee
ONE EXTRA WING - Our Bries drying rack features extra wings to expand the drying area. Perfect for additional drying space. The clothing rack can be used with or without unfolding the wings

LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE - The laundry dryer is light and easy to move from indoor to outdoor spaces. The clothing rack measures 62 x 61 cm when open and 62 x 38cm closed. The laundry dryer is easy to fold and store

METALTEX: With over 75 years of experience manufacturing Home Storage Solutions, Laundry Care and Kitchen Tools & Gadgets. We pride ourselves on delivering excellence, our mission is to make life easy by designing and manufacturing everyday intelligent housewares. We are committed to providing new and innovative products. Made in Italy
description: From the manufacturer Metaltex Faro 3-Tier Folding Laundry Tower Airer Dryer Metaltex Fortino 3-Tier Folding Laundry Tower Airer Dryer Metaltex Vulcano Folding Laundry Drying Rack Metaltex Nevis Over-The-Bath Laundry Airer Metaltex Gale Over-The-Door Laundry Dryer Metaltex 30 m Retractable Clothes Line Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 3.4 out of 5 stars 283 — 4.3 out of 5 stars 864 3.5 out of 5 stars 525 4.1 out of 5 stars 1,491 4.3 out of 5 stars 4,842 Price — no data — no data — no data — no data £62.00 £ 62 . 00 — no data Description The 3-Tier Folding Laundry Airer is a sturdy and space-saving solution for indoor/outdoor clothes drying. With ample space and easy folding, it's perfect for small spaces and practical home organization. Introducing the Metaltex Fortino 3-Tier Folding Laundry Airer. A durable, space-saving and perfect for larger laundry loads. When not in use, easily fold and store away for practical home organisation. The Vulcano Folding Laundry Airer has a reliable, generous drying capacity with two foldable wings for indoor/outdoor use. The sturdy steel frame and non-slip feet provide stability, while its compact design makes for easy storage. A versatile and space-saving solution with adjustable arms to fit most standard bathtubs. The Nevis Over-The-Bath Laundry Airer features a sturdy construction and non-slip feet ensure stability, making it perfect for everyday use. A space-saving laundry dryer. The Gale over-the-door laundrier is the ideal solution for smaller, quick-drying items. Supplied with two adjustable hooks, allowing it to be hung on 1 door. This space saving 30M washing line is easy to install and use. Simply fix one end of the washing line using the 2 screws. Comes with automatic locking and tightening device to keep your clothes line tight and secure at the required distance. Size 69 x 64 x 134 cm 69 x 64 x 134 cm 180/106 x 55 x 100 cm 51 x 55 cm 58 x 87 cm ‎9 x 16 x 18.5 cm Colours Silver Silver Black Silver Silver White Coating LDPE (low density polyethylene) LDPE (low density polyethylene) Epoxy Silver Polytherm Epotherm coating UV protective coating Rooms to use in Laundry Room, Utility Room Laundry Room, Utility Room Laundry Room, Utility Room Laundry Room, Utility Room Laundry Room, Utility Room Outdoor spaces
